section_name: Closing of Street or Alley by Home-rule Municipality
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
text: A home-rule municipality may vacate, abandon, or close a street or alley.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.007 — Closing of Street or Alley by Home-rule Municipality

A home-rule municipality may vacate, abandon, or close a street or alley.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A home-rule municipality may vacate, abandon, or close a street or alley.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
